title: Install QuTiP, run examples, and build a hello-world exercise
close_reason: Implemented in commit ec4bc7f: QuTiP 5.3.0 installed in .venv (Python 3.13), three canonical docs examples run and physically verified, hello-world Rabi-oscillation exercise self-verified against analytic cos(Omega*t) (err 1.6e-5)
